_meta.name: GoodMedika
_meta.description: Brand SERP rotation. Each iteration: (1) commercial_inflate warms Google's commercial-intent context (2 generic queries, 30% chance per iteration); (2) search_query fires the brand search — search_query has its own internal retry-on-no-ads (handles soft-blocks), so we DON'T add a manual refresh layer on top; (3) foreach_ad walks every ad on the SERP, and inside the loop the if(ad_is_external) gate filters to non-own ads (covers both competitors AND target-domain ads). The click_ad inside that gate uses skip_on_my_domain as a safety net. To click ONLY targets, flip only_on_target=true on click_ad — the outer ad_is_external still lets target ads through. To click ONLY pure competitors, switch the outer condition to ad_is_competitor instead of ad_is_external.

name: GoodMedika
description: Brand SERP rotation with commercial pre-warm. Click any non-own ad (competitors + targets). For target-only behaviour set only_on_target=true on click_ad — the ad_is_external outer condition is permissive enough to let it filter inside.

steps._comment: Pre-warm Google's commercial-intent context. probability=0.3 means ~30% of iterations get the warm-up (rest fire the brand search cold — variation looks more natural). click_organic=true gives a stronger signal at +~10s per pre-query.
search_query has BUILT-IN refresh-on-no-ads (4 attempts with 13-15s gaps). No external `if no_ads -> refresh` block needed — it would just duplicate the work and wastes 7+ refreshes per empty SERP.
Walk every ad. Shuffle so we don't always click the top slot first (more natural).

ad_is_external = 'any ad NOT on my domain' (covers competitors AND target-domain ads). Use this when you want flexibility inside via only_on_target / skip_on_target. To click ONLY pure competitors (excluding targets), switch kind to ad_is_competitor.

then_steps._comment: skip_on_my_domain stays as a paranoid safety net (the outer ad_is_external already excludes own domain — but if my_domains list is misconfigured at run-time, this is the second line of defense). only_on_target=false -> click both competitors and targets. Flip to true if you want target-only.
Short between-click pause inside foreach_ad. probability=0.6 means most of the time we pause — but not always (foreach_ad already has a built-in scan-pause between iterations).

steps._comment: Cool-down between query-loop iterations. Real users don't run searches back-to-back without breathing room.
